title: AI is KILLING your SaaS! Here's WHY. #shorts
summary: AI agents are evolving and posing competitive challenges to SaaS businesses. The piece discusses how businesses must adapt to the changing AI landscape to remain competitive and grow.
writeup: This short argues that AI agents are advancing to the point of competing with established SaaS businesses. It frames the shift as a pressure on existing software companies to adapt or lose ground. The takeaway: businesses must adjust to the changing AI landscape to stay competitive and continue growing.
